title: Release 0.3.10 warning triage and publish flow
acceptanceCriteria: Telegram diagnostics are no longer misleading and distinguish invalid token, transport-specific failures, Desktop-vs-Bot-API reachability caveats, and broader connectivity issues where safe evidence allows.
Codex websocket 403 warnings are severity-correct, wording-correct, and non-duplicated across setup, doctor, verify, and Final Summary.
Final Summary, Next steps, and end-screen output do not duplicate the same warnings or overlapping advice and remain concise and non-contradictory.
Mini App port 3001 remains truthfully classified as a real conflict or supported reuse case without duplicated or exaggerated advice.
Regression coverage exists for fixed product bugs and stable dedupe/classification paths, with any uncovered path explicitly justified.
Proof bundle contains frozen scope, reproduction artifacts, evidence, verifier output, and final verdict.
Release 0.3.10 is fully published only after a successful fresh verifier pass.
